title: Zero In Total Insect Killer Powder – Fast-Acting Ant Killer for Indoor & Outdoor Use, Kills Crawling Insects, Eliminates Wasp Nests & Infestation – Long-lasting Protection for Up to 12 Weeks – 450g
features: ULTIMATE INSECT KILLER – Eliminate pests indoors and outdoors with Zero In Total Insect Killing Powder. This fast-acting bug killer instantly eliminates a wide range of crawling and flying insects on contact while delivering long-lasting protection throughout your home and garden

VERSATILE PROTECTION – Whether dealing with ants, cockroaches, or wasps, this ant killer and wasp killer provides effective control and protection against insect infestations and wasp nests. Ideal for use in living spaces, patios, and sheds, it maintains a pest-free environment

FAST-ACTING & LONG-LASTING – Powered by permethrin, this ant powder provides up to 12 weeks of residual protection. Perfect for treating ant trails, cracks, crevices, and wasp nest entry points, ensuring consistent control over time

PRECISE & EASY TO USE – Shake the wasp nest powder well before use, remove cap, and snip the nozzle. Using the puffer nozzle, apply a fine dust of powder into hard-to-reach places. This cockroach killer covers up to 45m² or 7 wasp nests, making it efficient and easy to use

CARING FOR PEOPLE & THE PLANET – Zero In protects your health and home against Home Pest problems with minimal environmental impact. Zero In products are ethical and welfare-friendly solutions to everyday Home Pest problems that safeguard your well-being. We care for you, your family, and the planet
description: From the manufacturer Total Indoor Insect Killer Total Loft & Garage Fumigator Total Insect Killer Bomb Total Insect & Germ Killer Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 9,233 2.9 out of 5 stars 5 3.9 out of 5 stars 596 4.0 out of 5 stars 231 Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 Description Fast-acting, low-odour indoor insect spray kills bugs on contact and protects for up to 4 weeks. Safe for surfaces. Available in single to triple packs. Single-use smoke bomb for lofts and garages kills insects at all life stages. Fast-acting, deep-penetrating formula with no residue. Easy to use and prevents reinfestation. One-shot insect killer bomb for rooms up to 150m³. Kills flies, ants and fleas at all life stages. Plant-based, low-odour, residue-free and easy to use for lasting indoor pest control. 2-in-1 indoor spray kills insects and the germs they leave behind. Fast-acting, low-odour and stain-free with up to 12 weeks' protection. Safe for hard surfaces; easy to use daily. Available in single or twin packs. Suitable for Indoor Indoor Indoor Indoor Format Spray Fumigator Fumigator Spray Reusable ✓ no data no data ✓ Easy to Use Shake well, spray insects from 60–90cm, or apply a 5-second burst for room treatment. Place on a heatproof surface in a sealed area, ignite, leave for 2 hours, then ventilate. Simple, effective pest control in one step. Press the nozzle to activate, place centrally, leave for 2 hours, then ventilate. One bomb treats rooms up to 150m³—ideal for periodic pest control. Shake well, twist nozzle to spray or steam and apply from 30cm. Ready to use for ongoing indoor bug protection.
